specific_question: What is the average cross-sell uplift (%) when bakery items are displayed near coffee, dairy, or snack products during the Q2-Q3 2025 promotional cycles across all Lee's Market's U.S. stores?
answer: During Q2-Q3 2025, across all Lee's Market's U.S. stores, bakery items displayed near coffee or snack products generated an estimated 12% cross-sell uplift, compared to approximately 7% when placed beside dairy items.
justification: Identifying cross-sell synergies reveals which product pairings enhance impulse buys. This insight supports redesigning layouts where bakery displays complement breakfast or dessert items. It turns adjacency planning into a measurable sales lever.
dr_question: As per the report by the U.S. Census Bureau's indication of a rise in food service sales since August 2024, how can Lee’s Market optimize in-store layouts and product displays across its U.S. locations to increase bakery sales by 15% by the end of Q1 2026?
